---
title: "Anne Catharina Woollcombe"
---

## Anne Catharina Woollcombe

**Dates:** (d.1913)

**Maiden name:** (Pode)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Daughter of WCY’s sister Anne (Yonge) Pode, she married (30 July 1861) William John Woollcombe (1832-1913).

### Letters

- Letter from May 2 [1900]
- Letter from March 23d 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
